title: SynaptAction
description: A concrete next-step or action item identified in the source text.

origin.description: How this action was derived. "extracted" if explicitly stated in the source; "proposed_from_goals" if inferred from stated goals.

entity_refs.description: Extraction-local IDs of entities responsible for or involved in this action.

due.description: When the action is due (ISO 8601 date or datetime), if stated.
